name: vibe2prod toolkit
description: Index of standalone Claude Code tools. Each entry points at a repo that carries its own install.json describing what to install (commands, hooks, launchers). The installer reads this manifest, then installs only the tools the user picks. Add a new tool = add one entry here; nothing else changes.

tools.desc: Definition-of-Done gate — prove a change works with real data before you claim done or deploy. Ships a deploy-blocking hook + an advisory 'you claimed done with no proof' nudge.
Session-continuity command set: /handoff, /handoff-many, /wrapup, /pickup, /new-session, /debug, /postmortem, /fix-skill. Bundled here for now; being split into their own repos over time.
